positive.stdout:

    palace_of_flies != harry_potter).

    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

    new_vessel_press != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    new_vessel_press != harry_potter).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~published_by(harry_potter,new_vessel_press)).

% SZS output end Saturation.

for all inputs,
    define publishing_house(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define language(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,

% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
